title: begonia × hybrida
intro: Begonia × hybrida, commonly known as the Begonia hybrid or Angel Wing Begonia, is a cross-bred plant resulting from the hybridization of various Begonia species. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Begonia × hybrida include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of this plant are typically used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
